rationale: The citing paper manipulates marketing cues (logo conspicuousness, ad-copy goal primes) and studies downstream changes in brand evaluation, while the cited paper provides a goal-based processing mechanism (regulatory goal compatibility/conflict via fluency) for how prior cues alter subsequent brand evaluations. This thematic overlap suggests the cited work could be a substantive mechanism/theory source rather than an incidental mention, and the DOI match confirms a real reference link.
